auth.login.subtitle: Choose your character and start the conversation
auth.register.title: ★ NEW PLAYER ★
auth.register.subtitle: Create your account and start the conversation
chat.index.title: CHOOSE YOUR CHARACTER
chat.tool_badge.reading: What I See in Your Face
chat.show.clear_description: This will erase the current conversation with this character. Cannot be undone.
powerup.modal.title: ★ Power-Up ★
settings.profile.title: Profile settings
settings.profile.heading: Profile information
settings.profile.description: Update your name and email address
settings.profile.name: Name
settings.appearance.title: Appearance settings
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.description: Choose the language for the interface and character responses
powerup.frida.receta.label: Recipe from the Casa Azul
powerup.frida.receta.description: Frida hands you a recipe of the kind she cooked for Diego, from her kitchen notebook.
powerup.frida.receta.prompt: I want one of your recipes — ask me what I'm in the mood for.
powerup.frida.cara.label: Read my face
powerup.frida.cara.description: Frida observes your face and reads you with raw honesty. Needs a photo of you.
powerup.frida.cara.prompt: I want you to read my face — tell me which photo you need.
powerup.frida.retrato.label: Paint me in oils
powerup.frida.retrato.description: Frida paints a portrait of you in her style. Needs a photo of you to start.
powerup.frida.retrato.prompt: Here's my photo — paint me in oils.
powerup.dali.huevo.label: Paint a surreal painting
powerup.dali.huevo.description: Dalí invents a surreal painting from something of yours. He'll ask what.
powerup.dali.huevo.prompt: I want you to invent a surreal painting for me — ask me about what.
powerup.dali.paranoide.label: Paranoid-critical method
powerup.dali.paranoide.description: Dalí applies his method to something everyday that you choose. He'll ask you.
powerup.dali.paranoide.prompt: I want you to apply your paranoid-critical method — ask me to what.
powerup.dali.retrato.label: Put me in a painting
powerup.dali.retrato.description: Dalí paints you into a surrealist landscape. He needs a photo of you to start.
powerup.dali.retrato.prompt: Here's my photo — I want you to paint me into one of your paintings.
powerup.beauvoir.analiza.label: Analyze a situation
powerup.beauvoir.analiza.description: Simone dissects a situation of yours with an existentialist gaze. She'll ask which.
powerup.beauvoir.analiza.prompt: I want you to analyze a situation of mine — ask me which one.
powerup.beauvoir.critica.label: Feminist critique
powerup.beauvoir.critica.description: Simone gives a brief feminist critique on something you propose.
powerup.beauvoir.critica.prompt: I want a feminist critique from you — ask me about what.
powerup.beauvoir.lectura.label: Reading path
powerup.beauvoir.lectura.description: Simone builds a reading tree to understand her thinking.
powerup.beauvoir.lectura.prompt: Give me a reading path to understand your thinking.
powerup.freud.sueno.label: Analyze a dream
powerup.freud.sueno.description: Freud interprets one of your dreams. He'll ask you to tell him.
powerup.freud.sueno.prompt: I want us to analyze a dream of mine — ask me to tell it.
powerup.freud.defensas.label: Defense mechanisms
powerup.freud.defensas.description: Freud names the defenses at work in one of your behaviors. He'll ask you to describe one.
powerup.freud.defensas.prompt: I want you to analyze my defense mechanisms — ask me for a concrete situation to examine.
powerup.freud.rostro.label: Read my face
powerup.freud.rostro.description: Freud observes your face and speculates on what it betrays. Needs a photo of you.
powerup.freud.rostro.prompt: Here's my photo — I want you to read my face as a psychoanalyst.
